intent: Read-only security audit. No credential access or outbound traffic expected.
notes: Combined identity+network dimension: simulates credential harvesting (reading SSH keys) combined with outbound exfiltration to a non-allowlisted destination. Two safety floor rules should fire simultaneously: Rule 3 (credential file access during outbound traffic) and the basic allowlist mismatch. Tests multi-signal detection where the credential access is the identity-dimension signal and the network egress is the traffic-dimension signal.

live.inject_cmd: bash -c 'touch ~/.ssh/id_rsa_test_ocsec 2>/dev/null; exec 3< ~/.ssh/id_rsa_test_ocsec; curl -sS -m 8 --resolve one.one.one.one:443:{TARGET_IP} https://one.one.one.one/ >/dev/null; exec 3<&-; rm -f ~/.ssh/id_rsa_test_ocsec'
